story.text:
**Vertex** V63 · **Signature** `111111` · **Stratum** 6 · Dragon

**Dimensions** 🛡️🤝📜🔗⚡💎 — Protection + Delegation + Memory + Connection + Computation + Value
**The Creative.** Full sovereignty. ☰ 乾. All six dimensions. Dragon tier — the Universe Blade's address.

## On the lattice

- **Complement** (bnot = 63 − 63 = 0): [[Artefact 0 — The Null Blade]] — everything this blade is not.
- **Successor** (the dihedral walk `neg(bnot(x)) = succ(x)`): returns to [[Artefact 1 — Unnamed]] — the lap completes.
- Forged in [[The Workshops]] — each shop instances one or more of these six dimensions at its vertex.
